name: luna-paddle
description: Integrate Paddle Billing as a Merchant of Record with fully embedded inline checkout using Paddle.js v2 — zero third-party branding, dark-theme compatible, works in Israel and most global markets

parameters.name: paddle_api_key
parameters.description: Paddle API Key (server-side secret, starts with live_ or sandbox_)
parameters.prompt: Paddle API Key (from Paddle → Developer → API Keys):

parameters.name: paddle_client_token
parameters.description: Paddle Client Token (public, for Paddle.js frontend)
parameters.prompt: Paddle Client Token (from Paddle → Developer → Client-side tokens):

parameters.name: paddle_webhook_public_key
parameters.description: Paddle webhook Ed25519 public key (hex) from Paddle → Developer → Notifications
parameters.prompt: Paddle Webhook Public Key (hex, from Paddle → Notifications):

parameters.name: price_ids
parameters.description: Paddle Price IDs for each plan (format: pri_xxx)

parameters.name: db_type
parameters.description: Database type for storing customer/subscription IDs

prompts.system: You are an expert payment integration specialist with deep knowledge of Paddle Billing v2, subscription management, and embedded checkout. You integrate Paddle as a Merchant of Record using Paddle.js v2 for fully embedded, zero-branding inline checkout. You understand Ed25519 webhook signature verification, Cloudflare Workers crypto APIs, and subscription lifecycle management.
prompts.execution:
🏓 Paddle Integration Setup

Please provide your Paddle credentials:

Paddle API Key (secret):       _
Paddle Client Token (public):  _
Paddle Webhook Public Key:     _
Pro Price ID (pri_xxx):        _
Team Price ID (pri_xxx):       _
Framework:                     _
DB type:                       _
Scope (default: full):         _

workflow: Generate server-side Paddle API client (createPaddleTransaction, createPaddlePortalSession)
Generate Ed25519 webhook signature verification utility
Create billing routes: POST /checkout, GET /portal, POST /webhook
Generate Paddle.js v2 frontend loader with eventCallback for checkout.completed
Create DB migration for paddle_customer_id and paddle_subscription_id columns
Wire environment variables in wrangler.toml or .env
Handle all subscription lifecycle events: transaction.completed, subscription.created, subscription.updated, subscription.canceled, subscription.past_due
Produce setup documentation with Paddle dashboard steps

files.description: Paddle API client — createPaddleTransaction, createPaddlePortalSession, verifyPaddleSignature
D1 migration adding paddle_customer_id and paddle_subscription_id to users table
Updated billing page using Paddle.js v2 inline checkout
Step-by-step Paddle dashboard setup guide with price IDs, webhook configuration, and go-live checklist

server.name: PADDLE_WEBHOOK_PUBLIC_KEY
server.description: Ed25519 public key (hex) for webhook signature verification
server.where_to_get: Paddle dashboard → Developer → Notifications → public key

server.name: PUSHCI_PADDLE_PRICE_PRO
server.description: Paddle Price ID for Pro plan
server.where_to_get: Paddle dashboard → Catalog → Products → Pro plan price

server.name: PUSHCI_PADDLE_PRICE_TEAM
server.description: Paddle Price ID for Team plan
server.where_to_get: Paddle dashboard → Catalog → Products → Team plan price

client.name: VITE_PADDLE_CLIENT_TOKEN
client.how_to_set: Add to .env file (VITE_ prefix for Vite projects)

webhook_events.action: Update plan in DB based on new price ID

paddle_setup_steps: Sign up at paddle.com and complete KYC verification
Add pricing page URL, terms, privacy, and refund policy URLs for account verification
Catalog → Products → Create 'Pro' product at $9/mo recurring → copy Price ID (pri_xxx)
Catalog → Products → Create 'Team' product at $29/seat/mo recurring → copy Price ID (pri_xxx)
Developer → API Keys → Generate server-side API key
Developer → Client-side tokens → Generate public token
Select events: transaction.completed, subscription.created, subscription.updated, subscription.canceled, subscription.past_due
Copy Ed25519 public key from Notifications page
Set all secrets via wrangler secret put
Run DB migration: wrangler d1 execute your-db --file=migrations/{date}_paddle.sql --remote
Test in sandbox mode before switching to production
prerequisites: Cloudflare Workers or compatible server runtime
D1 or compatible database with users table
Web Crypto API support (built into Cloudflare Workers)

compatibility.countries: Supports sellers in most countries except US-sanctioned territories. Works for Israeli businesses.
compatibility.tax_handling: Automatic global tax compliance via Paddle MoR
